name: Pat Cooper
blurb: Pat Cooper, born Pasquale Vito Caputo, was an American stand-up comedian who rose to prominence in the 1960s mining his Italian-American upbringing for routines like his breakout Italian Wedding bit.
bio: Pat Cooper, born Pasquale Vito Caputo, was an American stand-up comedian who rose to prominence in the 1960s mining his Italian-American upbringing for routines like his breakout Italian Wedding bit. He later cultivated a comically furious, motor-mouthed persona that made him a fixture on nightclub stages and on radio with Howard Stern and Don Imus.

timeline.ev: Breakout Italian Wedding routine on The Jackie Gleason Show
Releases the album Spaghetti Sauce and Other Delights
Died in Las Vegas at age 93

accolades: Headlined top venues including the Copacabana and the Sands
Opened for Frank Sinatra, Tony Bennett, and Sammy Davis Jr.

bits.t: Selected Cuts from Spaghetti Sauce & Other Delights
